title: Interactive CLI Tool for Development Workflows

tasks.title: Scaffold project structure, install fuse.js, configure biome override and vitest
tasks.description:
Create scripts/cli/ directory. Install fuse.js as root devDependency (pnpm add -Dw fuse.js). Add biome override in packages/biome-config/biome.json for scripts/cli/** to allow console.log. Add .cli-history.json to root .gitignore. Create scripts/cli/vitest.config.ts for CLI tests. Add 'cli' and 'test:cli' scripts to root package.json. Create empty scripts/cli.ts entry point.

Test requirements:
- Verify fuse.js is in devDependencies
- Verify biome override exists
- Verify .gitignore entry
- Verify vitest config resolves

subtasks.title: Add biome override for scripts/cli/** in biome config
Add cli and test:cli scripts to root package.json

tasks.title: Create TypeScript interfaces in types.ts
tasks.description:
Create scripts/cli/types.ts with all TypeScript interfaces: CommandCategory (union type), CommandMode (union type), CommandExecution (discriminated union with pnpm-root, pnpm-filter, shell), CliCommand (full interface with id, description, category, execution, dangerous, dangerMessage, source, mode, curated, argHint), CliHistory (version + entries), CliHistoryEntry (id, lastRun, runCount). All fields readonly. Use 'as const' where appropriate. Export all types with named exports.

Test requirements:
- Unit test: verify type exports compile correctly (import and use in test)
- Unit test: verify CommandExecution discriminated union narrows correctly

subtasks.title: Define CliCommand interface with all fields

tasks.title: Create categories module with definitions and display order
tasks.description:
Create scripts/cli/categories.ts. Define CATEGORY_DISPLAY_ORDER array with 9 categories in spec order (development, database, testing, code-quality, build, environment, documentation, infrastructure, package-tools). Define CATEGORY_LABELS map (category -> human-readable label). Define inferCategory(scriptName) function for auto-discovered scripts using pattern matching (build* -> build, dev* -> development, test* -> testing, lint*/format*/check*/typecheck* -> code-quality, db:*/seed*/migrate* -> database, clean* -> build, else -> package-tools). Define inferMode(scriptName) function (dev* -> long-running, test:watch/e2e:watch -> long-running, else -> one-shot).

Test requirements:
- Unit test: CATEGORY_DISPLAY_ORDER has exactly 9 entries
- Unit test: CATEGORY_LABELS has entry for every category
- Unit test: inferCategory returns correct category for each pattern (build, dev, test, lint, format, check, typecheck, db:, seed, migrate, clean, unknown)
- Unit test: inferMode returns long-running for dev*, *:watch patterns
- Test file: scripts/cli/__tests__/categories.test.ts

tasks.title: Create curated command registry with all 45 commands
tasks.description:
Create scripts/cli/registry.ts. Define CURATED_COMMANDS array with all 45 CliCommand objects from spec Part 2: 5 Development, 13 Database, 5 Testing, 7 Code Quality, 3 Build, 3 Environment, 3 Documentation, 1 Infrastructure, 5 Package Tools. Each command must have: id, description (max 60 chars), category, execution (typed discriminated union), dangerous flag, dangerMessage (for 5 dangerous commands), source, mode, curated: true, optional argHint. Export getCuratedCommands() function that returns the frozen array.

Test requirements:
- Unit test: exactly 45 curated commands
- Unit test: no duplicate IDs
- Unit test: all dangerous commands (5) have dangerMessage set
- Unit test: all commands have required fields (id, description, category, execution, source, mode)
- Unit test: description length <= 60 chars for all commands
- Unit test: all categories used are valid CommandCategory values
- Test file: scripts/cli/__tests__/registry.test.ts

subtasks.title: Define Build, Environment, Documentation, Infrastructure commands (10)

tasks.title: Create auto-discovery module for workspace scripts
tasks.description:
Create scripts/cli/discovery.ts. Implement: parseWorkspacePatterns(content) to extract glob patterns from pnpm-workspace.yaml using regex (no YAML library). getPackagePrefix(name) to convert package names to short prefixes (@repo/db -> db, hospeda-api -> api, admin -> admin). isExcludedScript(script, curatedIds) to filter noise (prepare, preinstall, postinstall, and turbo-orchestrated scripts that already exist as root curated commands). discoverCommands(curatedCommands) async function that: reads pnpm-workspace.yaml, globs for package.json files, reads all in parallel, generates CliCommand objects with auto-prefixed IDs, filters excluded scripts, merges with curated (curated takes precedence). Uses inferCategory and inferMode from categories module.

Test requirements:
- Unit test: parseWorkspacePatterns extracts patterns from sample YAML
- Unit test: getPackagePrefix handles @repo/*, hospeda-*, and plain names
- Unit test: isExcludedScript filters prepare, preinstall, postinstall
- Unit test: isExcludedScript filters turbo-orchestrated scripts when curated exists
- Integration test: mock file system with temp directory, verify full discovery pipeline
- Test file: scripts/cli/__tests__/discovery.test.ts

tasks.title: Create fuzzy search module with Fuse.js
tasks.description:
Create scripts/cli/search.ts. Import Fuse from 'fuse.js' (default export exception, add comment). Define FUSE_OPTIONS constant with spec config: keys [{name:'id',weight:0.5},{name:'description',weight:0.3},{name:'source',weight:0.2}], threshold:0.3, distance:200, ignoreLocation:true, ignoreDiacritics:true, includeScore:true, minMatchCharLength:2. Implement createSearchIndex(commands) that returns Fuse instance. Implement searchCommands(fuse, query) that returns sorted results. Handle empty query (return empty array).

Test requirements:
- Unit test: search for 'test' returns test-related commands first
- Unit test: search for 'db' returns database commands first
- Unit test: search for 'lint' returns code-quality commands
- Unit test: empty query returns empty array
- Unit test: diacritics ignored (migracion matches migración)
- Unit test: ranking is sensible (exact ID match scores higher)
- Test file: scripts/cli/__tests__/search.test.ts

tasks.title: Create command history module with atomic file operations
tasks.description:
Create scripts/cli/history.ts. Implement findMonorepoRoot() using import.meta.url to resolve repo root. Define HISTORY_PATH and MAX_ENTRIES=20. Implement readHistory() that reads .cli-history.json, handles missing/corrupt files by returning empty history {version:1,entries:[]}. Implement recordCommand(id) that upserts entry (update lastRun + increment runCount or create new), maintains max 20 entries, writes atomically (temp file + rename). Implement getRecentCommands(history, maxCount=5) that returns most recent entries sorted by lastRun descending.

Test requirements:
- Unit test: readHistory returns empty on missing file
- Unit test: readHistory returns empty on corrupt JSON
- Unit test: recordCommand creates new entry
- Unit test: recordCommand updates existing entry (increments runCount)
- Unit test: recordCommand enforces MAX_ENTRIES limit
- Unit test: getRecentCommands sorts by lastRun descending
- Unit test: getRecentCommands limits to maxCount
- Integration test: write then read roundtrip with temp file
- Test file: scripts/cli/__tests__/history.test.ts

tasks.title: Create terminal formatting module for output display
tasks.description:
Create scripts/cli/format.ts. Implement formatBanner(version) showing boxed 'Hospeda CLI vX.X.X'. Implement formatCommandLine(cmd) that formats 'id  description  [source]' with alignment (id padded to 20 chars, description padded to 50 chars). Prefix dangerous commands with warning symbol. Implement formatHelp(commands, categories) that outputs grouped help text per spec section 7.2. Implement formatList(commands, showAll) for --list output per spec section 7.3. Implement formatExecutionInfo(cmd) showing 'Running: id', 'Command: actual-command', 'Directory: cwd'. Implement formatResult(exitCode, durationMs) showing success/failure with timing.

Test requirements:
- Unit test: formatBanner includes version string
- Unit test: formatCommandLine aligns columns correctly
- Unit test: formatCommandLine prefixes dangerous commands with warning
- Unit test: formatHelp groups by category in display order
- Unit test: formatList outputs one command per line
- Unit test: formatList --all includes source tag
- Unit test: formatResult shows green checkmark for exit 0, red X for non-zero
- Test file: scripts/cli/__tests__/format.test.ts

subtasks.title: Implement formatList for plain text output

tasks.title: Create command runner module with signal handling
tasks.description:
Create scripts/cli/runner.ts. Implement buildSpawnArgs(cmd, extraArgs) that constructs {command, args, cwd} for each execution type: pnpm-root ('pnpm run <script> [-- extraArgs]'), pnpm-filter ('pnpm --filter <filter> <script> [-- extraArgs]'), shell ('<command> [extraArgs]'). Implement runCommand(cmd, extraArgs) that spawns child process with stdio:'inherit' and shell:true, forwards SIGINT/SIGTERM to child, returns exit code. Handle signal-based exits (SIGINT->130, SIGTERM->143). Clean up signal handlers on child close.

Test requirements:
- Unit test: buildSpawnArgs for pnpm-root type constructs correct command/args
- Unit test: buildSpawnArgs for pnpm-filter type constructs correct command/args
- Unit test: buildSpawnArgs for shell type constructs correct command/args
- Unit test: buildSpawnArgs appends extraArgs correctly for each type
- Unit test: buildSpawnArgs with empty extraArgs omits -- separator
- Integration test: mock child_process.spawn, verify correct args passed
- Integration test: verify signal handlers are registered and cleaned up
- Test file: scripts/cli/__tests__/runner.test.ts

subtasks.title: Implement buildSpawnArgs for all execution types
Handle exit codes and signal-based exits

tasks.title: Create direct mode module for CLI argument handling
tasks.description:
Create scripts/cli/direct.ts. Implement parseCliArgs(argv) that extracts: commandId (first positional arg), flags (--help/-h, --list/-l, --list-all/-la, --yes/-y), extraArgs (everything after --). Implement handleDirect(args, allCommands, fuse) that: for --help shows formatted help; for --list shows curated list; for --list --all shows all commands; for command ID does exact match in commands, then fuzzy fallback showing top 5 matches with user pick; executes found command via runner. Support --yes to skip dangerous confirmation. Show confirmation for dangerous commands using @inquirer/prompts confirm.

Test requirements:
- Unit test: parseCliArgs extracts command ID correctly
- Unit test: parseCliArgs extracts --help, --list, --yes flags
- Unit test: parseCliArgs extracts extra args after --
- Unit test: parseCliArgs handles -h, -l, -la, -y shorthand
- Unit test: handleDirect with --help returns help output
- Unit test: handleDirect with --list returns list output
- Unit test: handleDirect with exact match command executes it
- Unit test: handleDirect with unknown command shows fuzzy matches
- Test file: scripts/cli/__tests__/direct.test.ts

subtasks.title: Implement command lookup with exact + fuzzy fallback
Implement dangerous command confirmation with --yes bypass

tasks.title: Create interactive mode module with search and category navigation
tasks.description:
Create scripts/cli/interactive.ts. Implement buildChoices(commands, recentIds, categories) that creates @inquirer/prompts choice array with Separator objects for category headers and recent section. Implement runInteractiveLoop(allCommands, history) that: shows banner, builds Fuse index, enters loop: display search prompt (@inquirer/search with custom source function), on empty input show curated commands grouped by category with recent section, on input filter ALL commands via Fuse.js, on selection show execution info, confirm if dangerous, run command, show result, for one-shot commands show 'Press Enter to return', for long-running commands exit after completion. Handle ExitPromptError for Ctrl+C during prompts.

Test requirements:
- Unit test: buildChoices creates correct structure with separators
- Unit test: buildChoices includes recent section when history has entries
- Unit test: buildChoices omits recent section when no history
- Unit test: buildChoices groups commands by category in display order
- (interactive.ts is largely TTY-dependent; manual testing covers the full flow)
- Test file: scripts/cli/__tests__/interactive.test.ts (buildChoices only)

subtasks.title: Implement search source function with Fuse.js filtering
Implement one-shot vs long-running post-execution behavior
Implement interactive loop with ExitPromptError handling

tasks.title: Create main entry point with arg routing and CLI bootstrapper
tasks.description:
Create scripts/cli/main.ts with main() function: parse process.argv, load curated commands, run auto-discovery in parallel, merge commands, read history. If args contain a command or flags -> route to direct mode (handleDirect). If no args -> route to interactive mode (runInteractiveLoop). Wrap everything in try/catch for ExitPromptError (exit 0) and unexpected errors (log + exit 1). Create scripts/cli.ts as thin entry point that imports and calls main(). Ensure performance budget: startup < 500ms by running discovery in parallel with other init.

Test requirements:
- Unit test: main routes to direct mode when args present
- Unit test: main routes to interactive mode when no args
- Unit test: main handles ExitPromptError gracefully
- Unit test: main handles unexpected errors
- Test file: scripts/cli/__tests__/main.test.ts (mock direct/interactive modules)

subtasks.title: Implement main() with arg parsing and routing

tasks.title: Write unit tests for categories and registry modules
tasks.description:
Create scripts/cli/__tests__/categories.test.ts and scripts/cli/__tests__/registry.test.ts.

Categories tests: CATEGORY_DISPLAY_ORDER has 9 entries, CATEGORY_LABELS covers all categories, inferCategory correctness for all patterns (build*, dev*, test*, lint*, format*, check*, typecheck*, db:*, seed*, migrate*, clean*, unknown), inferMode returns correct mode.

Registry tests: exactly 45 commands, no duplicate IDs, all dangerous commands have dangerMessage, all required fields present, description <= 60 chars, all categories are valid, all execution types are valid, verify specific commands exist (db:start, dev:all, test, etc.).

subtasks.title: Write categories.test.ts with all pattern tests

tasks.title: Write unit and integration tests for discovery module
tasks.description:
Create scripts/cli/__tests__/discovery.test.ts.

Unit tests: parseWorkspacePatterns extracts correct patterns from sample YAML, handles missing/empty YAML. getPackagePrefix handles @repo/db->db, hospeda-api->api, admin->admin. isExcludedScript filters prepare/preinstall/postinstall, filters turbo-orchestrated when curated exists.

Integration test: create temp directory with mock pnpm-workspace.yaml and several package.json files (simulating apps/api, packages/db, etc.), run discoverCommands, verify correct commands generated with proper IDs, categories, and modes. Verify curated commands take precedence over discovered ones.

subtasks.title: Write integration test with mock workspace

tasks.title: Write unit tests for search and history modules
tasks.description:
Create scripts/cli/__tests__/search.test.ts and scripts/cli/__tests__/history.test.ts.

Search tests: createSearchIndex creates valid Fuse instance, search for 'test' returns test commands, search for 'db' returns database commands, search for 'lint' returns quality commands, empty query returns empty, diacritics test (migracion matches migración), ranking test (exact ID match scores best).

History tests: readHistory returns empty on missing file, returns empty on corrupt JSON, recordCommand creates entry, recordCommand increments runCount, enforces MAX_ENTRIES=20, getRecentCommands sorts by lastRun desc, limits to maxCount. Integration: write-then-read roundtrip with temp file.

subtasks.title: Write search.test.ts with fuzzy search tests
Write history.test.ts with CRUD and edge case tests
Write history integration test with temp file

tasks.title: Write unit tests for format and runner modules
tasks.description:
Create scripts/cli/__tests__/format.test.ts and scripts/cli/__tests__/runner.test.ts.

Format tests: formatBanner includes version, formatCommandLine aligns columns, formatCommandLine shows warning prefix for dangerous, formatHelp groups by category, formatList outputs correct plain text, formatList --all includes source, formatResult shows checkmark for 0 and X for non-zero.

Runner tests: buildSpawnArgs for pnpm-root constructs correct args, pnpm-filter constructs correct args, shell constructs correct args, extraArgs appended correctly, empty extraArgs omits --. Mock child_process.spawn to verify args passed. Verify signal handlers registered and cleaned up.

subtasks.title: Write format.test.ts with output formatting tests
Write runner.test.ts with mock spawn integration tests

tasks.title: Write unit tests for direct mode module
tasks.description:
Create scripts/cli/__tests__/direct.test.ts.

Tests: parseCliArgs extracts command ID, extracts --help/--list/--yes flags, extracts shorthand -h/-l/-la/-y, extracts extra args after --, handles no args. handleDirect with --help returns 0, with --list outputs curated commands, with --list --all outputs all commands, with exact match command calls runner, with unknown command shows fuzzy matches. Mock runner.runCommand and format functions. Test dangerous command flow with --yes bypass.

subtasks.title: Write parseCliArgs tests for all flag combinations
Write handleDirect tests with mocked dependencies

tasks.title: Update CLAUDE.md key commands section to document pnpm cli
tasks.description:
Update the 'Key Commands' section in the root CLAUDE.md to add pnpm cli and pnpm test:cli entries. Add a brief note that pnpm cli provides an interactive menu for discovering and running all development commands. Keep it concise (2-3 lines max).

No tests required (documentation only).

subtasks.title: Add pnpm cli to Key Commands section
Add pnpm test:cli to Key Commands section

tasks.title: Create utils.ts and fix type safety
tasks.description: GAPs: 007, 009, 019, 023, 027. Create scripts/cli/utils.ts with findMonorepoRoot() using marker file detection (walk up looking for pnpm-workspace.yaml). Create isExitPromptError() type guard. Update types.ts: discriminated union for dangerous/dangerMessage. Update categories.ts: add env*, docs*, setup* rules to inferCategory. Update all imports of findMonorepoRoot from history.js to utils.js.

subtasks.title: Create utils.ts with findMonorepoRoot using marker file detection
Create isExitPromptError type guard in utils.ts
Update types.ts: discriminated union for dangerous/dangerMessage
Add env/docs/setup rules to inferCategory in categories.ts
Update all imports of findMonorepoRoot to use utils.js

tasks.title: Fix runner.ts security and robustness
tasks.description: GAPs: 001, 003, 004, 032. CRITICAL: Remove shell: true from spawn. Add cwd: string to SpawnArgs interface. Pass cwd (from findMonorepoRoot) to spawn options. Add child.on(error) handler to clean up signal handlers. Document shell command splitting limitation in JSDoc.

subtasks.title: Remove shell: true from spawn call
Add cwd to SpawnArgs interface and spawn options
Add child.on(error) handler for signal cleanup
Document shell command splitting limitation in JSDoc

tasks.title: Fix discovery.ts deduplication and hardening
tasks.description: GAPs: 015, 024, 035, 038, 020, 012, 041, 043. CRITICAL: Fix deduplication by comparing execution (filter+script) not ID. Validate workspace patterns (reject .. and absolute paths). Validate package names/scripts with regex. Add Zod safeParse for package.json. Fix comment regex to string parsing. Document YAML parser limitations and TURBO exclusion logic in JSDoc. Add lifecycle hooks to EXCLUDED_SCRIPTS.

subtasks.title: Fix deduplication: compare by execution not by ID
Validate workspace patterns: reject .. and absolute paths
Add Zod safeParse for package.json parsing
Fix comments and document limitations in JSDoc

tasks.title: Fix history.ts testability and validation
tasks.description: GAPs: 005, 010, 031, 045, 025. Refactor readHistory()/recordCommand() to accept optional rootDir parameter. Add isValidEntry() filter for individual history entries. Add Math.max(0, maxCount) guard. Document race condition as known limitation in JSDoc. Add query length guard in search.ts (max 200 chars).

subtasks.title: Refactor readHistory/recordCommand to accept optional rootDir
Add isValidEntry filter for history entries
Add query length guard in search.ts

Unify ID_PAD between format.ts and interactive.ts. Read CLI version from root package.json. Extract magic number 48 to SEPARATOR_FILL_WIDTH constant. Remove dead _categories parameter from buildChoices.

subtasks.title: Dynamic ID padding and export pad constant

tasks.title: Fix interactive.ts and direct.ts UX issues
tasks.description: GAPs: 017, 027, 048, 049, 042. Unify dynamic imports to static imports in interactive.ts and direct.ts. Use isExitPromptError() from utils.ts in main.ts and interactive.ts. Recalculate defaultChoices after each command execution. Add --all flag support to parseCliArgs. Add warning for unknown flags.
